removed_features.name: cdr
removed_features.reason: Potential target leakage: Clinical Dementia Rating is too close to diagnosis.

notes: Post-CDR-removal performance dropped substantially versus prior benchmark metrics, which is expected if CDR was leaking diagnosis information.
Converted class recall is weak at 0.25 on only 8 test examples, so this model is not clinically reliable for conversion screening yet.
Current pipeline still includes StandardScaler before RandomForestClassifier; this is unnecessary for Random Forest and should be cleaned in a later task.
